allow: PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\laptop R\\Downloads\\valuelens" ; $env:DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=".env.production" ; npx dotenv -e .env.production -- npx prisma db push 2>&1)

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\laptop R\\Downloads\\valuelens" ; Get-Content .env.production | Where-Object { $_ -match "^DATABASE_URL=" -or $_ -match "^DATABASE_URL_UNPOOLED=" } | ForEach-Object { $parts = $_ -split "=", 2; [System.Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable\($parts[0], $parts[1]\) } ; npx prisma db push 2>&1)

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\laptop R\\Downloads\\valuelens" ; Get-Content .env.production | Where-Object { $_ -match "^DATABASE|^POSTGRES" } | ForEach-Object { $k = \($_ -split "="\)[0]; $v = \($_ -split "=", 2\)[1]; Write-Host "$k = $\(if \($v.Length -gt 0\) { '[' + $v.Length + ' chars]' } else { '[EMPTY]' }\)" })

Bash(git commit -m 'feat: refresh route now updates both company + screener caches *)
